heroHeadline: CJNG Crisis Day 45 — El 85 Co-Founder Pleads Guilty, El Mayo Sentencing Apr 13, O3 Leads Fractured Cartel
heroSubtitle: CJNG co-founder Erick Valencia-Salazar 'El 85' pleaded guilty to US drug trafficking charges April 7. El Mayo Zambada faces life sentence April 13 in Brooklyn. O3 leads post-Mencho CJNG under sustained Operativo Enjambre pressure. Mexico's two dominant cartel ecosystems now have founding leadership dead, imprisoned, or in US legal jeopardy.
footerNote: Aggregated intelligence from all Mexico-based Watchboard trackers. Data sourced from SEDENA, SESNSP, InSight Crime, OHCHR, and major international outlets.
